description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.6 Docker image with a postgres:latest service. Define a single job named all_tests that runs in the default test stage and is limited to the master branch. The job should export DB_HOST=postgres and DB_TYPE=docker, run apt-get update, install netcat with apt-get install netcat --assume-yes, then execute sh ./setup.sh, sh ./run_tests.sh, sh ./run_coverage.sh, and sh ./deploy.sh, and it runs on_success. No caches, artifacts, or additional deployment targets are configured.
